content: Remote OK Vehicle Repair Assessor Philippines Hire with Reef <p>Assure Scratch &amp; Dent are seeking an experienced Vehicle Repair Assessor to join their growing team. This is a full-time remote position based in the Philippines, supporting their Australian operations.</p><p>You will assess customer-submitted vehicle photos and videos, determine repair eligibility, prepare accurate repair quotes, and allocate repairs to our mobile repair technicians.</p><p>This role requires real-world panel beating or automotive repair experience and a strong understanding of cosmetic vehicle repairs.</p><ul><li>Minimum 3 years' experience as a Panel Beater, Estimator, Vehicle Damage Assessor or similar automotive repair role.</li><li>Strong knowledge of modern vehicle construction and repair techniques.</li><li>Excellent understanding of cosmetic SMART repairs.</li><li>Ability to determine what repairs can safely and effectively be completed by a mobile repair van.</li><li>Ability to identify repairs that require workshop facilities or replacement parts.</li><li>Experience preparing repair estimates and quotations.</li><li>High attention to detail.</li><li>Excellent written English.</li><li>Strong computer skills.</li><li>Ability to work independently in a remote environment.</li></ul><p></p><p>Responsibilities </p><ul><li>Assess vehicle damage from photos and videos submitted by customers.</li></ul><ul><li>Identify repair methods suitable for mobile cosmetic repair.</li><li>Determine when damage requires a traditional body shop rather than a mobile repair.</li><li>Prepare accurate repair quotations using company pricing guidelines.</li><li>Estimate labour times and material requirements.</li><li>Assess scratches, dents, paint damage, bumper repairs, alloy wheels, mirrors and other cosmetic repairs.</li><li>Identify pre-existing damage and multiple repair areas.</li><li>Escalate complex repairs where required.</li><li>Liaise with customer service, sales and scheduling teams.</li><li>Maintain fast turnaround times while ensuring assessment accuracy.</li><li>Keep detailed assessment notes within the CRM.</li></ul><p></p><p>Highly Regarded</p><ul><li>Experience with cosmetic/mobile repair businesses.</li><li>Knowledge of Australian vehicle repair standards.</li><li>Experience working with Australian customers.</li></ul> mobile, ops, sales 2026-06-30T14:00:03+00:00 1134253 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-vehicle-repair-assessor-philippines-hire-with-reef-1134253 There may be upcoming roles that aren't listed yet, and we're always keen to talk to exceptional people excited to join our mission.<br><br>What We Offer<br><br><ul><li>Challenging work at the frontier of AI-native healthcare</li><li>In-person collaborative culture in a beautiful work space in the Cambridgeshire countryside</li><li>An onsite gym and digital health subscription of your choice</li><li>Early stage equity with employee-friendly terms (via an EMI scheme)</li><li>Comprehensive medical coverage (including dental and optical) and life insurance</li><li>Optional remote working on Wednesdays, with an annual allowance of 10 extra remote days</li><li>Desk setup allowance for your favourite keyboard / mouse / whatever!</li><li>Monthly team feasts (and the BBQ is used most days)</li><li>A fast paced work environment geared towards excellence and professional growth (with annual training budget)</li><li>A chance to have a big impact in a small team transforming care and outcomes at population scale<br><br></li></ul><br><br><strong>About Flok<br><br></strong>More than <strong>a billion people</strong> a year suffer unnecessarily from conditions like MSK pain, where the right treatment approach is well-established but undeliverable at scale. Reporting to the Integrated Services Manger, your main responsibilities will entail high volume accommodation check-ins and flight bookings, data entry, database maintenance and receptionist duties.<br><br>This is a local hire role meaning you need to live in Weipa and surrounding suburbs however we will consider fly in fly out from Cairns for the right applicant.<br><br><strong>About You<br><br></strong>You will consider yourself a well organised, self-motivated individual and hospitality professional with the ability to the below criteria:<br><br><ul><li>Accommodation reservation experience (In-flight) preferable in a remote village, resort or similar environment</li><li>Administration experience supporting a very fast paced team</li><li>Inflight Accommodation system knowledge desirable but not essential</li><li>Intermediate to advanced proficiency in MS Office Suite </li><li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills are essential</li><li>Proven ability to listen to customer needs, exceed expectations and provide outstanding customer service in a friendly manner</li><li>Open C class Driver Licences is essential<br><br></li></ul><strong>So what next? <br><br></strong>If this sounds like the right job for you, please apply.<br><br><strong>About Sodexo<br><br></strong>Sodexo provides a range of services at remote locations across Australia, servicing both on-shore and off-shore sites, in difficult and challenging environments.
